title: build_request allocates two Strings per call after OnceLock removal
description: The OnceLock that cached the 'using' Vec<String> was intentionally removed and replaced with a per-call Vec allocation in build_request. Every JMAP method call now allocates and frees two String heap objects for the urn: URNs. For a polling-heavy or high-throughput client this creates measurable per-call overhead. Simpler alternative: use &'static str in JmapRequest.using and change the field type, or use a once_cell/LazyLock at the module level with a static slice reference.
